description_long: This is a heavily weathered, rust-colored pickup truck with a boxy, utilitarian design reminiscent of older American models. The body is covered in visible rust and corrosion, with numerous dents and scratches, suggesting long-term exposure to harsh conditions. The truck features four doors, with the front left door partially open, revealing a sparse and dark interior. The wheels are basic and appear damaged or incomplete, and the windows are either missing or heavily tinted, adding to the abandoned look. The rear of the vehicle is flat and closed off, lacking a visible cargo bed, which is unusual for a typical pickup truck. The overall appearance suggests this vehicle has been out of use for a significant period, possibly serving as an environmental prop in a post-apocalyptic or derelict urban setting.
description: A rusted, boxy pickup truck with four doors, heavy weathering, and no visible cargo bed. The vehicle appears abandoned and damaged, with a partially open door and missing or dark windows.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile, with the front door ajar and extensive rust and damage visible along the body.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the flat, closed-off back with no visible cargo bed and two rectangular taillights.
description_view_2: Side view of the right profile, showing all doors closed and the same rusted, damaged exterior.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the boxy hood, grille, and two front windows, with the left door slightly open.
